title: partners: add langchain-arcadedb integration
body_text:
## Summary

New partner package for **[ArcadeDB](https://arcadedb.com)**, the multi-model database with native Bolt protocol support and 97.8% OpenCypher TCK compatibility.

- `ArcadeDBGraph` — drop-in replacement for `Neo4jGraph` that connects via the standard Neo4j Python Bolt driver
- **APOC-free**: schema introspection and graph document import use pure Cypher (no APOC procedures required)
- Satisfies the `GraphStore` protocol — works with `GraphCypherQAChain` out of the box
- Dependencies: only `langchain-core` and `neo4j` (Bolt driver)

### Why ArcadeDB?

ArcadeDB is an open-source multi-model database (108k+ Docker pulls/month) that natively supports graph (OpenCypher/Gremlin), document (SQL), key-value, time-series, and vector models in a single engine. Its Bolt protocol endpoint lets existing Neo4j tooling connect without modification.

### Key adaptations from langchain-neo4j

| APOC procedure | ArcadeDB replacement |
|---|---|
| `apoc.meta.data()` for node props | Sample nodes per label, infer property types from values |
| `apoc.meta.data()` for rel props | Sample rels per type, same inference |
| `apoc.meta.data()` for patterns | `MATCH (a)-[r]->(b) RETURN DISTINCT labels(a)[0], type(r), labels(b)[0]` |
| `apoc.merge.node()` | `UNWIND $rows AS row MERGE (n:Type {id: row.id}) SET n += row.properties` |
| `apoc.merge.relationship()` | `MATCH ... MERGE (a)-[r:TYPE]->(b) SET r += row.properties` |

### Files

```
libs/partners/arcadedb/
├── langchain_arcadedb/
│   ├── __init__.py
│   ├── arcadedb_graph.py     # Main ArcadeDBGraph class
│   ├── graph_document.py     # Node/Relationship/GraphDocument dataclasses
│   ├── schema.py             # APOC-free schema introspection
│   └── py.typed
├── tests/
│   ├── unit_tests/
│   │   ├── test_imports.py
│   │   └── test_graph_document.py
│   └── integration_tests/
│       ├── test_arcadedb_graph.py
│       └── test_compile.py
├── scripts/
│   ├── check_imports.py
│   └── lint_imports.sh
├── pyproject.toml
├── Makefile
├── README.md
└── LICENSE
```

## Test plan

- [x] Unit tests pass (imports, data structures)
- [x] Integration tests pass against ArcadeDB 26.2.2 with Bolt plugin (`com.arcadedb.bolt.BoltProtocolPlugin`)
- [x] Schema introspection detects node/rel properties and relationship patterns
- [x] `add_graph_documents()` merges nodes and relationships correctly
- [x] Idempotent merge verified (no duplicate nodes on re-import)
- [x] `ArcadeDBGraph` satisfies `GraphStore` protocol (runtime check)
- [x] Follows partner package conventions (hatchling build, ruff config, Makefile, test structure)

extracted_data.summary: This issue proposes adding a new `langchain-arcadedb` partner package, featuring `ArcadeDBGraph` as an APOC-free, `Neo4jGraph` replacement that integrates ArcadeDB with LangChain via the Bolt protocol and satisfies the `GraphStore` protocol.
